implementation_log: Implemented T15 batch orchestration with deterministic IDs/artifact paths, static pre-validation, failure-isolated per-run execution, checkpoint hook callbacks, and backward-compatible schema/interface updates. Added a concrete deterministic runner (`DeterministicBatchRunner`) that executes the cartesian grid of parameter sets × symbols × windows, captures successful results only in `results`, records both success/failure in `run_records`, and aggregates `run_count`, `success_count`, and `failed_count` correctly.
test_execution_summary: Runtime tests were not executed (static-validation-first). Added focused unit coverage for accepted grid inputs, deterministic run_id/batch_id stability, deterministic artifact path template, failure isolation with partial completion, aggregate counters correctness, mixed success/failure run_records, checkpoint hook events, and malformed input pre-validation. Recommended command: pytest tests/test_tw_quant_batch_runner.py -q
summary: T15 batch runner functionality is implemented within scope: deterministic batch orchestration for Taiwan symbol subsets, checkpointable execution flow, and partial-result resilience on per-run errors, with required contract/schema extensions kept backward-compatible.
next_action: Route to Manager/QA for T15 validation against acceptance criteria and focused batch-runner tests.
